statement: In every magma, Equation 291 (`x = ((y * z) * x) * y`) implies Equation 1480 (`x = (y * x) * (x * (x * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0474
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) x) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y x) (op x (op x z)))
